title: GPS Blank Tag Fix
notes: Blank manual GPS fields no longer convert to 0.000000 coordinates when a hole is saved.
Only holes with valid manually entered latitude and longitude values receive GPS callouts.
Existing false 0,0 and invalid NaN GPS callouts created by m38.18 are removed automatically.
Valid manually entered GPS coordinates and adjusted callout positions remain unchanged.
The m38.18 Quick Fill touch-targeting correction remains included.
